calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: D. Alexander Jones, via ZOOM, counsel for Melanie Sauter, Petitioner.
At the outset, counsel is advised that the court's main issue with this matter is the failure to insure accounts which exceed the limits covered by the FDIC. Counsel reports that he is aware of the issue regarding the uninsured funds but respectfully requests that the court consider and approve the petition regardless as the funds will not exceed the FDIC limits once the attorney's fees have been paid. The court advises counsel to take note of the issue of uninsured funds moving forward.

The Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
